Comment: deploy results-api partial ballot summary aggregation and re-export

commands: sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && docker compose --env-file .env up -d --no-deps --build results-api'

sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && for i in $(seq 1 30); do status=$(docker inspect --format "{{if .State.Health}}{{.State.Health.Status}}{{else}}{{.State.Status}}{{end}}" election-results-api-1); echo results-api=$status; if [ "$status" = "healthy" ] || [ "$status" = "running" ]; then break; fi; sleep 2; done'

sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && docker compose exec -T results-api python - <<"PY"
from hermes.results_api.app import governor_results_response
summary = governor_results_response(use_cache=False).get("summary", {})
print({"countedUnits": summary.get("countedUnits"), "validBallots": summary.get("validBallots"), "invalidBallots": summary.get("invalidBallots"), "abstainedBallots": summary.get("abstainedBallots"), "countedBallots": summary.get("countedBallots")})
PY'

sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && docker compose exec -T line-relay python - <<"PY"
from hermes.supervisor.services.static_results_export import export_static_governor_results
print(export_static_governor_results())
PY'
